# Warranty Claim

To initiate a warranty claim, customers must provide their order number and a description of the issue via the support portal. After submitting the claim, an advisor will provide a prepaid return label. Upon confirming the defect, the unit will be repaired or replaced at no cost, with replacement units retaining the original warranty period instead of starting a new one-year warranty.

[Source: warranty.md#warranty-claim]
